articles.author: Tim Fernholz
articles.title: Max Hodak’s Science Corp. is preparing to place its first sensor in a human brain - TechCrunch
articles.description: The device could help address multiple neurological conditions if it proves successful. One early use could be delivering gentle electrical stimulation to damaged brain or spinal cord cells to encourage healing.
articles.content: Science Corporation, the startup from former Neuralink president and co-founder Max Hodak, has enlisted a top neurobiologist to lead the first U.S. human trials for its biohybrid brain-computer inter… [+5583 chars]

articles.author: Stephen Clark
articles.title: NASA chose the right crew to launch a new era of human space exploration - Ars Technica
articles.description: It’s a special thing to be human, and it’s a special thing to be on planet Earth."
